zh.lifeSummary: 當Johanna Beaumont於1489年出生在英國英格蘭越可爾艾藍德時，她的父親Richard de Beaumont IV29歲，母親Johanna de Sandford38歲。她於1510年之前與Robert Ramsden Sr.在英國結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1516年在英國英格蘭越可爾格特藍德享年27歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Johanna Beaumont于1489年出生在英国英格兰越可爾艾藍德时，她的父亲Richard de Beaumont IV29岁，母亲Johanna de Sandford38岁。她于1510年之前与Robert Ramsden Sr.在英国结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1516年在英国英格兰越可爾格特藍德享年27岁。

nameMeanings.name: Beaumont
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Gilles, Gaetan, Honore, Jacques, Jean-Guy, Marcel.

English (of Norman origin) and French: habitational name from any of the five places in Normandy or several others elsewhere in France so named. The placename comes from Old French beu, bel ‘fair, lovely’ + mont ‘hill’. There are also places in England so named under Norman influence in Cumberland, Lancashire, and Essex, the last of which changed its name in the 12th century from Fulepet ‘foul pit’ to Bealmont ‘beautiful hill’; these may also have given rise to the surname. The surname is now widespread throughout England, but most common in Yorkshire. Compare Belmont .

History: Many English bearers of this surname are descended from Henry de Beaumont (died 1340), who came to England from France as a soldier, serving Kings Edward I, II, and III of England. He acquired the earldom of Buchan in Scotland by marriage. — Many American bearers of this surname are descendants of John Beaumont (1612–47), who came to North America from England in 1630. William Beaumont came from England to Cambridge MA in 1635 and subsequently moved to CT.

variants.name: Bement
meanings: English (Cambridgeshire): variant of   Beaumont  . This surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Beeman
meanings: English (Kent): occupational name for a beekeeper, from Middle English bee-man ‘bee-keeper’ (Old English bēo + mann).
Americanized form of German Biemann or of its Dutch cognate Bieman.

variants.name: Belmont
meanings: French and English (of Norman origin): variant of   Beaumont  .
Catalan: habitational name from the placename Bellmont ‘beautiful mountain’. Compare Spanish   Belmonte  .

variants.name: Baumunk
meanings: German: probably a Germanized form of a French Huguenot name Beaumont (see also Beaumont ).

variants.name: Bayman
meanings: Americanized form of German Beumann or Bäumann, variants of Baumann .

nameMeanings.name: Johanna
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Jane
meanings: Originally a feminine form of John , from the Old French form Je(h)anne. Since the 17th century it has proved the most popular of the feminine forms of John, ahead of Joan and Jean . It now also commonly occurs as the second element in combinations such as Sarah-Jane. In Britain it is still one of the most frequent of all girls' names. It is not a royal name, but was borne by the tragic Lady Jane Grey ( 1537–54 ), who was unwillingly proclaimed queen in 1553 , deposed nine days later, and executed the following year. Seventy years earlier, the name had come into prominence as that of Jane Shore , mistress of King Edward IV and subsequently of Thomas Grey , 1st Marquess of Dorset, Lady Jane's grandfather. Jane Shore's tribulations in 1483 at the hands of Richard III , Edward's brother and successor, became the subject of popular ballads and plays, which may well have increased the currency of the name in the 16th century. A 19th-century influence was its use as the name of the central character in Charlotte Brontë's novel Jane Eyre ( 1847 ). From 1932 to 1959 it was used as the name of a cheerful and scantily clad beauty whose adventures were chronicled in a strip cartoon in the Daily Mirror. It is also borne by the American film stars Jane Russell ( 1921–2011 ) and Jane Fonda ( b. 1937 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Johanna Beaumont was born in 1489, in Elland, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Richard de Beaumont IV, was 29 and her mother, Johanna de Sandford, was 38. She married Robert Ramsden Sr. before 1510, in England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1516, in Greetland, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 27.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Johanna Beaumont est née en 1489, à Elland, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Richard de Beaumont IV, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Johanna de Sandford, avait 38 ans. Elle a épousé Robert Ramsden Sr. avant 1510, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1516, à Greetland, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 27 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Johanna Beaumont 1489 in Elland, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Richard de Beaumont IV 29 und ihre Mutter Johanna de Sandford 38. Sie hat vor 1510 in England Robert Ramsden Sr. geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1516 im Alter von 27 Jahren in Greetland, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Johanna Beaumont è nata il nel 1489 nel Elland, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Richard de Beaumont IV, aveva 29 anni e sua madre, Johanna de Sandford, aveva 38 anni. Lei sposato Robert Ramsden Sr. prima del 1510, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1516, nel Greetland, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 27 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Johanna Beaumontが1489年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアエランドで生まれた時，父Richard de Beaumont IVは29歳，母Johanna de Sandfordは38歳であった。1510年以前にイギリスでRobert Ramsden Sr.と結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1516年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアグレエトランドで27歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Johanna Beaumont(이)가 1489년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 엘랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Richard de Beaumont IV(은)는 29세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Johanna de Sandford(은)는 38세였다. 그녀는 1510년 이전 영국에서 Robert Ramsden Sr.(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1516년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 그릿랜드에서 27세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Johanna Beaumont родилась в 1489 г. в местности элланд, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Richard de Beaumont IV было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Johanna de Sandford, 38. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Robert Ramsden Sr. перед 1510 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1516 г. в местности гритланд, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 27 лет.
